steps.text: Determine the optimum sampling system configuration for measuring the target analytes.
Select the techniques and/or equipment for the measurement of sample pressures and temperatures in the sample cell.
Heat sample transport lines to maintain sample temperature at least 10 °F (5 °C) above the dew point for all sample constituents.
Prepare an analysis algorithm for acquired spectra.
Perform post-run QA per section 9.1.2 of this method.

preconditions.text: If the moisture of the sampled gas was much higher than anticipated, a shorter pathlength cell or more dilute sample may be needed.

constraints.text: Ensure safety data sheets (SDS) for gas standards are available to all personnel using this method.
Follow safety and health practices consistent with stationary source sampling.
